items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Generative classification, Gaussian class-conditional densities, and Naive Bayes factorization.

items.title: Pattern Classification (Duda, Hart & Stork)
items.author: Duda, Hart, Stork
items.note: Classic treatment of Bayes classifiers and continuous feature likelihood models including Gaussian assumptions.

items.title: scikit-learn GaussianNB documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: API for closed-form fit, theta_/var_ attributes, var_smoothing, and predict_log_proba.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Linear methods vs generative classifiers; logistic regression contrast to Naive Bayes.
